subtitle: A selection of real-world data platforms and tools I've delivered.

items.title: Enterprise Snowflake Data Platform
items.text: Designed and built a Snowflake warehouse integrating multiple enterprise data sources and delivering curated, governed datasets for analytics and reporting teams.

items.title: Snowflake Cost & Usage Monitor
items.text: Built Streamlit dashboards and Airflow pipelines to export and analyze Snowflake usage and query logs, with SLA‑based alerting and automated tickets. Improved pipeline reliability and reduced compute costs by tuning warehouses and clustering strategies.

items.title: Security & Governance Automation
items.text: Implemented automated security alerting using Snowflake stored procedures to detect schema changes, network policy updates, and role escalations. Integrated alerts with tickets and notifications to enforce governance across banking datasets.

items.title: SQL Server → Snowflake Migration
items.text: Migrated SQL Server sources into Snowflake using IICS mappings, mapping tasks, and taskflows. Designed optimized Snowflake schemas, staging and warehouse layers, and bulk loading flows to deliver reliable, performant reporting datasets.

items.title: Banking Data Platform for Finance & Risk
items.text: Built and supported a Snowflake cloud data warehouse for banking datasets such as AFS Vision, Treasury, Commercial Loans, and Consumer Loans. Used IICS and DBT to deliver analytics‑ready models for finance and risk teams, codifying business logic and improving transparency.
